product.name: Rattan Nightstand with 2 Drawers and Storage Shelf, 26” Tall Wide Night Stand, Wood Large Bedside Table with Golden Handle for Bedroom, Side Table, Carbon Cherry
features: Modern & Boho Style: Upgrade your bedroom with wide nightstand! With dimensions of 26.8" W x 15.6" D x 25.5" H, it fits perfectly in most spaces. It blends bohemian charm with modern elegance, serving as a stylish focal point in any room

Ample Storage Solutions: This nightstand with drawers offers great storage. The 2 drawers can store books, magazines and personal items. The bottom open shelf lets you place larger objects like baskets or decorative items. The smooth-gliding metal runners ensure quiet, effortless use

Stylish Details: Each drawer of the night stand features authentic handwoven rattan, showcasing unique artisan details. The gold - ring handles add a touch of elegance. Its square shape and wooden frame with a natural finish blend with various decors. The integration of natural elements makes your space more inviting and cozy

Durable & Versatile: Built with a reinforced wood frame and durable rattan, this wide nightstand stays stable (holds up to 33lbs). It can be used as a bedside table or end table in different rooms like bedrooms, living rooms and studies. Its sturdy construction and unique look make it a great addition to your home
Easy Assembly: Clear instructions with illustrations and labeled parts make assembly easy. Screws and parts are individually labeled and packaged, offering a hassle - free setup experience
